title: Soil carbon sequestration in semi arid tropics - impact of long-term improved management on soil carbon sequestration of Vertic  inceptisols in the semi arid tropics of central peninsular India
abstract:
The objectives of this study were to exalnine the ill1pact of 11 years of sequential cropping under
